titles.en: Chapter on the Name of the Mountain Where People Stand at Arafah
Chapter on the Name of the Mountain Where People Stand at Arafah

segments: 2985 - سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : مَا اِسْمُ جَبَلِ عَرَفَةَ اَلَّذِي يَقِفُ عَلَيْهِ اَلنَّاسُ فَقَالَ « أَلاَلٌ ».
arabic.text: 2985 - سُئِلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : مَا اِسْمُ جَبَلِ عَرَفَةَ اَلَّذِي يَقِفُ عَلَيْهِ اَلنَّاسُ فَقَالَ « أَلاَلٌ ».

segments:
Hadith.2985 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked:
"What is the name of the mountain at Arafat where people stand?"
Imam (as) replied: "Al-Alal."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2985 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) was asked:
"What is the name of the mountain at Arafat where people stand?"
Imam (as) replied: "Al-Alal."
